description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named OS X that runs on pull requests and pushes to the master branch, excluding changes to .github/workflows. The workflow should also be triggerable manually. It should have two jobs, build_meson and build_cmake, both running on macos-14. Each job checks out the code, installs meson or cmake and ninja, installs dependencies with brew, configures the build project, builds it, and runs tests.
